system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_material_insert","body":"
CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_MATERIAL_Insert]
( 
	@idxuong    nvarchar(200), 
	@mavt       nvarchar(200), 
	@tenvt      nvarchar(max), 
	@mota       nvarchar(max), 
	@quycach    nvarchar(200), 
	@dayy       nvarchar(200), 
	@rong       nvarchar(200), 
	@dai        nvarchar(200), 
	@cao        nvarchar(200), 
	@mausac     nvarchar(200), 
	@dvt        nvarchar(200), 
	@nhom       nvarchar(200), 
	@mancc      nvarchar(200), 
	@tenncc     nvarchar(200), 
	@hinhanh1   image, 
	@ghichu     nvarchar(200), 
	@kho        nvarchar(200), 
	@seq7       nvarchar(100) = NULL, 
	@seg8       nvarchar(100), 
	@seg9       nvarchar(100), 
	@seq10      nvarchar(100), 
	@dobuc      nvarchar(100)  = NULL, 
	@solop      nvarchar(100)  = NULL, 
	@nguyenlieu nvarchar(200)  = NULL, 
	@dacdiem    nvarchar(200)  = NULL, 
	@dongia     decimal(18, 3)  = 0, 
	@create_by  nvarchar(50), 
	@update_by  nvarchar(50)
)
AS
BEGIN

DECLARE @xacnhan bit = 1
IF(@kho = N'BAO BÌ' or @kho = N'HÓA CHẤT' or @kho = N'NGŨ KIM')
BEGIN
	SET @xacnhan = 0
END

    INSERT INTO tr_material
    ( 
		 idxuong
	    , mavt
	    , tenvt
	    , mota
	    , quycach
	    , dayy
	    , rong
	    , dai
	    , cao
	    , dacdiem
	    , mausac
	    , dvt
	    , nguyenlieu
	    , nhom
	    , mancc
	    , tenncc
	    , dongia
	    , dongia_goc
	    , loaitien
		 --hinhanh,
	    , hinhanh1
	    , ghichu
	    , kho
	    , seq7
	    , seg8
	    , seg9
	    , seq10
	    , dobuc
	    , solop
	    , xoa
	    , create_by
	    , create_date
	    , update_by
	    , update_date
		, xacnhan 
    )
    VALUES
    ( 
		 @idxuong
	    , @mavt
	    , @tenvt
	    , @mota
	    , @quycach
	    , @dayy
	    , @rong
	    , @dai
	    , @cao
	    , @dacdiem
	    , @mausac
	    , @dvt
	    , @nguyenlieu
	    , @nhom
	    , @mancc
	    , @tenncc
	    , @dongia
	    , '0' --dongia_goc
	    , 'VND' --loaitien
		 --'hinhanh',
	    , @hinhanh1
	    , @ghichu
	    , @kho
	    , @seq7
	    , @seg8
	    , @seg9
	    , @seq10
	    , @dobuc
	    , @solop
	    , 'N' --xoa
	    , @create_by
	    , GETDATE() --create_date
	    , @update_by
	    , GETDATE() --update_date
		,@xacnhan
    )
END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":[],"writesTables":["dbo.tr_material"],"flags":[],"suggestedTier":"B"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
